title: CLI surfaces raw AJV error messages instead of field-named guidance
description: On a validation failure the CLI surfaces the raw thrown .message; the script's formatAjvError turns AJV instancePath/schemaPath into field-named guidance. CLI users get the raw AJV string (e.g. `/gaps/18/evidence: must be array`) rather than a field-named message.

evidence.reference: catch surfaces raw err.message; no AJV translation
formatAjvError translates AJV instancePath/schemaPath into field-named guidance
GAP-5 in the parity survey, categorized CLI-post-call

impact: Validation errors are harder to act on from the CLI than from the script, slowing the dogfooding write loop.
proposed_resolution: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
